acwr.title: ACWR
acwr.sub: safe band 0.8–1.3 · the athlete doesn't see this number
acwr.forma: Acute load ÷ 4-week rolling average (includes the current week).
acwr.sirve: Flags load spikes that precede risk; out of band → consider a deload.
acwr.lectura: Safe band 0.8–1.3; >1.3 caution, >1.5 alert. The athlete doesn't see this number.

load.title: Acute vs chronic load
load.forma: Weekly load (bars) and chronic load = 4-week rolling average (line).
load.sirve: See the load trend; the chronic load is the baseline ACWR is measured against.
load.lectura: The chronic line (4-wk rolling average) is the reference: bars well above it = a spike, and that's what inflates ACWR.

recovery.title: Recovery
recovery.sub: sustained HRV ↓ and resting HR ↑ = alert
recovery.forma: Weekly HRV and resting heart rate (RHR) compared against the athlete's own baseline.
recovery.sirve: Read recovery: a sustained HRV drop or RHR rise suggests fatigue.
recovery.lectura: Band around the baseline; out of band (HRV↓ / RHR↑) = watch closely.

comp.title: Compliance
comp.forma: Sessions completed over planned per week (bars) + mean reported RPE (line).
comp.sirve: See whether the plan is being met and at what perceived cost.
comp.lectura: Bars: green ≥85%, amber ≥70%, red below. RPE on a 5–10 scale.

imr.title: ARI vs phase
imr.sub: phase's expected corridor ±2 (moves with the macro)
imr.forma: Reported ARI (average relative intensity) vs the band the program expects in each phase.
imr.sirve: Spot a mismatch between plan and reality; if ARI drifts out of the phase band, review the loads.
imr.lectura: Stepped band per phase (moves with the macro), with a ±2 tolerance.

weight.title: Weight vs category
weight.forma: Weekly bodyweight vs the target weight-category band.
weight.sirve: Track whether the athlete makes weight for their category ahead of competition.
weight.lectura: Band = category limits; the dot is green inside, red outside, neutral if no category is set.

wellness.title: Wellness
wellness.forma: Wellness score (0–100) + the 6 questionnaire items (fatigue, soreness, stress, mood, motivation, sleep) as trends.
wellness.sirve: Subjective context that complements the physiological signals.
wellness.lectura: The score reads against your own normal (mean±std band); each item vs its own trend.

timeline.title: Macrocycle · timeline
timeline.forma: Weekly volume (bars) + mean intensity per phase (line) across the macro, with the taper before each competition.
timeline.sirve: See the road to competition and how volume is restructured to peak.
timeline.lectura: Phase ribbon on top; 🚩 = competition; TODAY = current week; the taper lowers the bars before each 🚩.
timeline.aria: Macrocycle {name} · {count, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}}

periodization.aria: Periodization {name} · {count, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}}
periodization.ribbonWeeks: wk {range} · {count, plural, one {# wk} other {# wk}}

dayDetail.rest: Rest — no session scheduled. Recovery is half the work.
dayDetail.noExercises: No exercises prescribed for this day.
